shift_templates_subtitle: Define recurring shift windows assigned to cashiers and staff
shift_template_confirm_toggle: Change activation state for this template?
shift_template_confirm_delete: Delete this shift template? Existing shifts will keep working but new ones cannot be assigned.
shift_template_empty_hint: Create a template to define recurring shift hours for your team.
shift_template_error_required: Name, start and end time are required
shift_template_error_time_format: Time must be in HH:MM format
sessions_page_subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your admin account
sessions_confirm_revoke_body: The device will be signed out immediately.
sessions_confirm_logout_all_body: All devices, including this one, will need to sign in again.
sessions_empty_body: You will see other devices here once they sign in.
sessions_cannot_revoke_current: Use Logout to end the current session
perm_page_subtitle: Toggle what each role can do across the app
perm_reset_confirm: Reset this role to default permissions?
perm_wildcard_hint: Wildcard (*) grants every current and future permission
perm_unknown_keys: Some permission keys are not recognised
stock_alerts.title: Stock Alerts
stock_alerts.subtitle: Configure inventory notifications and view items needing attention
stock_alerts.help.threshold: Optional. Leave blank to use per-item defaults
license_plans_subtitle: Pick a plan and submit a change request — billing kicks in only after vendor approval.
license_top_up_warn: Balance is low — please top up.
plan_change_already_pending: A plan change is already pending.
plan_change_unregistered: This install is not registered yet.
license_plans_empty: No plans available from control center.
license_plans_unreachable: Control center unreachable. Try again shortly.
hr_cash_subtitle: Track register deposits, withdrawals and movements
hr_cash_amount_required: Amount must be greater than zero
leave_types_subtitle: Manage leave categories, quotas, and approval rules
leave_type_confirm_deactivate: Deactivate this leave type? Existing balances and requests remain intact.
leave_type_empty_hint: Create your first leave category to start tracking employee time off.
leave_type_quota_hint: Set to 0 if this type should not deduct from a balance
leave_type_carryover_hint: Days unused at year end that roll into the next year
leave_balance_select_employee_hint: Pick an employee to view their leave balances
leave_balance_no_data_hint: Run 'Initialize Annual Balances' to create rows for all active employees and leave types
leave_balance_initialize_subtitle: Create balance rows for all active employees and leave types for the given year. Existing rows are skipped. Unused days from the prior year carry over up to the type's max_carryover.
hr_events_subtitle: Promotions, warnings, transfers and other employment milestones
hr_event_hint_old_value: What it was before — e.g. previous position or salary
hr_event_hint_new_value: What changed to — e.g. new position or salary
hr_event_timeline_empty: No events recorded for this employee yet
hr_event_empty_subtitle: Log a promotion, warning or transfer to start the history
hr_goals_empty_hint: Create a goal to start tracking employee performance
Submit this review? You won't be able to: Submit this review? You won't be able to edit it after.
Acknowledge this review on behalf of the: Acknowledge this review on behalf of the employee?
Only DRAFT reviews can be edited: Only DRAFT reviews can be edited
expcat_field_budget_hint: Optional. Leave blank for no limit.
expcat_confirm_delete: Deactivate this category? It will be hidden but not removed.
expcat_delete_note: Categories with pending expenses cannot be deactivated.
expcat_empty_subtitle: Create your first category to start tracking expenses by type.
expcat_error_name_duplicate: A category with this name already exists
ntpl_page_subtitle: Edit the Telegram messages the system sends and preview them before saving
ntpl_hint_type: Stable slug like order_paid. Cannot be changed later.
ntpl_hint_type_locked: Type slug is fixed after creation
ntpl_hint_body: Use placeholder tokens (in curly braces). Reserved Python format syntax like x.__class__ is rejected.
ntpl_hint_desc: List which variables this template understands so editors know what they can insert.
ntpl_preview_context_hint: Object with keys matching the placeholders in the body. brand is filled automatically.
ntpl_preview_empty: Run a render to see the output your customers would receive.
ntpl_delete_confirm: Delete this template? The matching event will fall back to its default text.
ntpl_empty_state_body: Add a template to control how a Telegram alert looks for a given event.
ntpl_error_duplicate_type: A template already exists for that type
ntpl_error_missing_key: Context is missing a placeholder the template needs
ntpl_error_unsafe_token: Template uses a disallowed format expression
notif_page_subtitle: Toggle delivery and edit message templates
notif_field_template_text_help: Use placeholders — e.g. brand, order_id, amount (in curly braces). Unsafe attributes like x.__class__ are rejected.
notif_empty_subtitle: Templates appear once they are seeded in the backend.
notif_settings_subtitle: Telegram bot, recipients, and master switch
notif_field_bot_token_hint: Get this from BotFather on Telegram. Stored once; left blank means unchanged.
notif_field_chat_ids_hint: Press Enter to add a chat id. Each one will receive notifications.
notif_field_is_enabled_hint: Master switch — turn off to silence the bot entirely
notif_field_timeout_hint: How long to wait for Telegram before giving up
notif_action_test_hint: Queues a test message to every configured chat id
notif_action_test_confirm: Send a test notification to every configured chat?
notif_help_chat_id: Tip: send /id to userinfobot or your bot in the target chat to get its id
notif_queue_subtitle: Pending Telegram notifications waiting to be sent
notif_queue_confirm_process_body: The server will attempt to deliver every queued item. Items that fail will remain in the queue.
notif_queue_confirm_clear_body: This permanently drops every pending message. It cannot be undone.
notif_queue_toast_offline: Telegram is offline — nothing was sent
qr_print_hint: Print and stick on the table
qr_token_stable_hint: Token stays valid as long as the table exists
discount_secret_subtitle: Enter a hidden codeword to apply its linked discount to an open order.
discount_secret_word_help: Case-insensitive. Matches against active SECRET_WORD discounts only.
discount_secret_order_id_help: Order must be unpaid and not canceled.
discount_secret_empty_hint: Submit a secret word above to see the result here.
item_drill_subtitle: Stock card, levels, and movement history
item_drill_deactivate_blocked: Cannot deactivate while stock is on hand
